title: tragopogon gongylorrhizus
intro: Tragopogon gongylorrhizus, also known as salsify or goat's beard, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Asia. The root of this plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tragopogon gongylorrhizus include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as possessing antibacterial properties that can help combat infections. Tragopogon gongylorrhizus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried root for medicinal purposes, and is often used in herbal remedies for its health benefits.
